summary: Iteration 182 — Frontend-only verification of the redesigned Laundry Booking page (/services/laundry/booking/{id}) for Royal Fresh (74e62cd9-64a3-4efa-899a-ab1c970e1c28). Cloudflare workaround from iter181 (API login via page.request.post + localStorage seed + direct nav) worked perfectly. All 5 user-requested redesign blocks verified end-to-end against the live preview. 20/20 expected data-testids present, all behaviors (toggle, search, promo, conditional surcharge/address, purple total) verified.

issues: Confirm Booking button is disabled (disabled prop) when no payment method or no items selected, so clicking it produces NO toast/feedback — user has no visual hint why the button is grayed out. handleSubmit() contains correct toast.error calls but is never reached because the button never fires onClick when disabled. Consider removing the disabled flag and relying on the validation toasts inside handleSubmit, OR add a tooltip/inline hint explaining 'Add items & select a payment method to continue'. Minor UX gap, not a bug.

action_items: (Optional UX) Replace the disabled-button gate on data-testid='confirm-booking-btn' with the existing toast-based validation in handleSubmit so users get explicit feedback (currently the button is silently disabled and the friendly error messages never fire).
critical_code_review_comments: LaundryBooking.jsx — All 5 user-spec sections present and correctly implemented: (1) shop-info-card right column with hero gradient + storefront image overlay, fuchsia 'Pressing' badge, rating stars, operator (Laudro-Automation), address (Buea Road 8 — Ekona, Ekona), phone, 30h turnaround, Items (N) summary list. (2) laundry-price-breakdown is Travel-style with rows in correct order (Items Subtotal → Express → Pickup surcharge → Service fee 5% → Promo → Discount → Total), Total uses text-purple-700 (verified DOM class), NO navy/cyan residue. (3) Payment Method block lives inside the SAME sticky card directly below price-breakdown. (4) 'Your Information' header replaces 'Pickup Details' (0 'Pickup Details' strings on page). pickup-method-toggle renders two cards: 'Pickup from me' with '+1,500 FCFA surcharge' badge (orange) when delivery_fee>0; "I'll drop them off" with 'No fee' badge (emerald). Toggling to self HIDES info-address and removes the 'Pickup surcharge' row from the breakdown — verified live (0 occurrences after toggle, both return after switching back). (5) Select Items card uses a 2-col-mobile/3-col-md grid of ItemCard components with 48px thumbnails (image_url falling back to Shirt lucide icon), purple count badge top-right when active, search filter narrows 5 items → 1 when typing 'shirt'. items-grid container has max-h-[420px] with overflow-y-auto so the page does not grow vertically.
ItemCard subcomponent (lines 75-130) — data-testids item-card-*, item-inc-*, item-dec-*, item-count-* all present, well-isolated.

Promo flow — POST /api/promo-codes/validate is correctly wired (toUpperCase, includes service_type='laundry' and amount). Invalid code 'FAKE_NOPE_999' correctly displays 'Invalid promo code' error text in the breakdown card.

Code-quality nit: LaundryBooking.jsx is 899 lines — above the 700-line guideline. ItemCard, StepIndicator and the shop-info-card could be extracted into /components/services/laundry/* for readability. Non-blocking.
Console: a few 403s appear in the network tab from preview-tracking/CF endpoints — they do NOT affect the booking flow (login, pressing shop GET, promo validate all return 200 in the same session).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — 20/20 data-testids found, all 5 redesign blocks verified live (shop-info-card, price-breakdown, payment-below-breakdown, Your-Information rename + pickup-method-toggle, redesigned items grid with thumbnails/search/scroll-confine)

seed_data_creation: None — used existing Royal Fresh pressing shop 74e62cd9-64a3-4efa-899a-ab1c970e1c28 with 5 item_prices (Shirt 2500, Jeans 3000, Suit 7499, Dress 1300, Pullover 2700) and delivery_fee=1500.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloudflare workaround that works on this preview: (a) POST /api/auth/login via page.request.post to get tokens, (b) goto root with realistic UA + wait_until='domcontentloaded', (c) localStorage.setItem access_token + refresh_token + user, (d) direct goto target route, (e) dismiss 'Skip for Now' modal. Total session ≤30s, no CF interstitial encountered this run. Royal Fresh shop ID 74e62cd9-64a3-4efa-899a-ab1c970e1c28 confirmed live with 5 item_prices and delivery_fee=1500. Live screenshot saved confirming visual layout: thumbnails, badges, gradient hero, purple-700 total, payment-method-inside-sticky-card all render correctly.
rca of the issue: No functional bugs found. One minor UX observation: the Confirm Booking disabled-button gate silently swallows clicks instead of surfacing the friendly toast validation messages already coded in handleSubmit() — main agent may want to soften the disabled state to disabled-only when paymentInProgress is true and let the toast.error path handle the rest. All other spec items are correctly implemented.
